# sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb_service_classes (Data Source)

List of available load balancer service classes for AppRun Dedicated

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_lb_service_classes" "main" {}

output "lb_service_class_names" {
  value = data.sakura_apprun_lb_service_classes.main.classes[*].name
}

output "lb_service_class_paths" {
  value = data.sakura_apprun_lb_service_classes.main.classes[*].path
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `classes` (Attributes List) List of load balancer service classes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--classes))

<a id="nestedatt--classes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `classes`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The service class name
- `node_count` (Number) The number of nodes assigned
- `path` (String) The service class path
